init(FilterConfig) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.FrontControler
Initializes the Front Controller filter.
isDate(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Evaluates if a given date string can map safely to a concrete runtime Date context.
isEmail(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Validates the email format criteria using a standardized regular expression.
isInteger(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Verifies whether the provided string can be safely parsed into a valid integer value.
isLong(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Verifies whether the provided string can be safely parsed into a valid long integer value.
isName(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Checks if the provided text string matches standard structural conventions for human names.
isNotNull(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Checks if the passed string value contains data (is neither null nor empty).
isNull(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Checks if the passed string value is null or has an empty trimmed length.
isPassword(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Validates password complexity against rigorous standard configuration criteria.
isPasswordLength(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Simple standalone check to verify whether the password character bounds fall strictly between 8 and 12 characters.
isPhoneLength(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Simple verification constraint tracking that checking value matches an explicit length of 10 digits.
isPhoneNo(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Validates standard mobile phone structural format constraints.
isRollNo(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Validates whether the incoming string complies with structural Roll Number format requirements.
isSunday(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
Resolves whether the specific given calendar date value falls on a Sunday.
